title: BRAS2MOMS - 211info
text: BRAS2MOMS AT COLUMBIA MEMORIAL HOSPITAL BRAS2MOMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides nursing bras and tanks to moms who cannot afford them. Each mom is eligible to receive up to two items. Most bras are gently used and all are in excellent condition. 2111 Exchange Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Mothers, at least two weeks post-partum, who have difficulty affording a nursing bra Hours: No standard hours Email Get Directions Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, email, or visit website for fitting dates and times FEES: None; A donation of $5 is encouraged to help cover costs and keep the program running DOCUMENTS: Photo ID LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: 1st and 3rd Tuesdays of the month from 1pm-3pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located inside the OB/Lactation Department, first floor of the hospital from the east entrance Services: Nursing Clothing If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BRAS2MOMS AT COLUMBIA MEMORIAL HOSPITAL
